title: The Road to Sabaody: Rising Conflict
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #2, Duval, Unknown person #4, Franky, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #2, Duval, Unknown person #4, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Time out, Nami!! The takoyaki comes first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aw, crap! I just insulted myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ngh... came... you're safe? Thank goodness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aah!! Hacchin!! They really got you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You know how rare octopus Fishmen are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gngh... Don't do it, Camie... Don't come...

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: I have to go save my friend!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then let us help you out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: In exchange, how about you tell us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How we can get to fishman island?

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: Eh!? You really mean it, Nami-chin?

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #2, Duval, Unknown person #4, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.
